title: donnellsmithia dissecta
intro: Donnellsmithia dissecta, also known as Donnellsmithia, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico, where it is found in the states of Oaxaca and Chiapas. Donnellsmithia dissecta has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Donnellsmithia dissecta is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
